items.title: Unblock #52: capture live worker-outcome artifact and set timeout threshold
items.description: Run one live worker-outcome capture and document threshold decision for #34/#52.

items.title: Board UX: show active filter summary badges above lanes
items.description: Display compact chips for active board filters to avoid hidden constraints during triage.

items.title: Board UX: persist board filter presets as URL templates
items.description: Save/restore common board filter sets (assignee/project/state/priority/due-window/search).

items.title: Benchmark UX: add optional endpoint filter for focused load checks
items.description: Allow benchmark_task_board.py to run a subset of endpoints via CLI so operators can isolate regressions quickly.

items.title: Board lanes: sort Next column cards by priority then due date
items.description: Keep Next lane deterministic for autonomous planning and operator triage.

items.title: Unblock #52: capture one worker outcome sample via non-subagent runner or fixture import
items.description: Need one concrete worker outcome dataset (completed vs timed_out) to set timeout threshold for #34/#52 while autonomous loop remains subagent-disabled.

items.title: Unblock #34: run worker outcome sweep and set timeout threshold
items.description: Execute one real fanout cycle, capture completion/timeout ratio, and document unblock threshold for #34.

items.title: Benchmark: define TODO App performance SLA (p50/p95 load, interaction latency, API throughput)
items.description: Produce measurable SLA targets and acceptance checks for board/task workflows.

items.title: Reliability: add regression coverage for nav active-state styling on non-board routes
items.description: Assert active-route highlighting across /tasks,/projects,/people,/settings to prevent navigation orientation regressions.

items.title: Board UX: Focus active view defaults to Next/In Progress + assignee Samwise
items.description: Requested by Ian: board-first multi-page UX architecture.

items.title: Unblock #34: measure spawned-worker completion/timeout ratio and define exit threshold
items.description: Run one full Next sweep with actual sessions_spawn workers using compact prompts + 180s timeout. Capture done/timeout ratios and propose quantitative unblock threshold for #34.

items.title: Unblock #34: validate 180s worker timeout + compact prompt success rate over one full Next sweep
items.description: Run one complete deterministic fanout cycle using emit-spawn-spec payloads and record completion/timeout metrics by task.

items.title: Unblock #34: tune subagent worker timeout + prompt budget for higher completion rate
items.description: Raise runTimeoutSeconds policy for analysis workers and shrink prompt payload so batched fanout returns actionable notes instead of timeouts.
